prerequisites.value: Str 13, Improved Bull Rush, Improved Unarmed Strike, Power Attack.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you successfully bull rush an enemy and its movement is stopped by a solid object or barrier, you deal your unarmed strike damage to the foe, as long as itâs within your threatened area. If you performed your bull rush as part of a charge, you gain a +2 bonus on your damage roll.
